queries.question: List all graphic designer positions and also list web developer positions at 2/7 London Street offices.
queries.sql:
SELECT Position.title 
FROM Position
WHERE Position.creative_industry_profession = "Graphic Designer" OR Position.creative_industry_profession = "Web Developer" AND Position.office = "2/7 London Street"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?position a :Position .
  ?position p:title ?title .
  ?position p:creative_industry_profession ?creative_industry_profession_w .
  ?position p:creative_industry_profession ?creative_industry_profession_w2 .
  ?position p:office ?office_w .
  FILTER((STR(?creative_industry_profession_w) = "Graphic Designer" || (STR(?creative_industry_profession_w2) = "Web Developer" && STR(?office_w) = "2/7 London Street")))
}

queries.question: Show graphic designer positions and web developer positions at 2/7 London Street offices.
queries.sql:
SELECT Position.title 
FROM Position
WHERE (Position.creative_industry_profession = "Graphic Designer" OR Position.creative_industry_profession = "Web Developer") AND Position.office = "2/7 London Street"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?position a :Position .
  ?position p:title ?title .
  ?position p:creative_industry_profession ?creative_industry_profession_w .
  ?position p:creative_industry_profession ?creative_industry_profession_w2 .
  ?position p:office ?office_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?creative_industry_profession_w) = "Graphic Designer" || STR(?creative_industry_profession_w2) = "Web Developer")) && STR(?office_w) = "2/7 London Street"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show graphic designer positions and web developer positions at 2/7 London Street offices.
